action.reasoning: Observation: LightGBM trained with only 8 best iterations (early stopping triggered very early), validation IC=0.0191, ICIR=0.1363. The model stopped too early. Analysis: The early stopping of 50 rounds triggered at iteration 8, meaning the model barely trained. I need to increase n_estimators and tune hyperparameters better. Also, the IC is quite low - I should try more trees with better parameters. Decision: First submit eval to get baseline score, then train a better model with more trees and better hyperparameters.
